LAW AND MOTION 302, PLAINTIFF LAW OFFICES OF DOUGLAS A. KAHN'S PETITION TO CONFIRM ARB AWARD IS GRANTED. NO OPPOSITION FILED. ORDER SIGNED IN OPEN COURT. JUDGE: RONALD E. QUIDACHAY REPORTER: BELDON YEE, CSR #2647
